blocks.text: Champions League Night: Miracles, Comebacks, and Norwegian Honour in Rio

Tuesday delivers an avalanche of high-stakes sport. Two Champions League second legs hang on knife-edges at 21:00, while Norway's CS2 trio — rain, hallzerk, and sense — continue their IEM Rio campaign in Brazil. Casper Ruud hunts clay-court glory in Barcelona.
🎮 IEM Rio 2026 — rain, hallzerk, and sense carry Norwegian CS2 pride in Brazil. Ongoing from 02:00
